functions.name: UnregisterForRemoteNotifications
functions.description: Requests Requests unregistering from receiving remote notifications to the user's device.

functions.name: UnloadPrimaryAssetList
functions.description: Unloads a primary asset, which allows it to be garbage collected if nothing else is referencing it

functions.name: UnloadPrimaryAsset
functions.description: Unloads a primary asset, which allows it to be garbage collected if nothing else is referencing it

functions.name: TransactObject
functions.description: Notify the current transaction (if any) that this object is about to be modified and should be placed into the undo buffer.

functions.name: StackTrace
functions.description: Prints a stack trace to the log, so you can see how a blueprint got to this node

functions.name: SphereTraceSingleForObjects
functions.description: Sweeps a sphere along the given line and returns the first hit encountered.

functions.name: SphereTraceSingleByProfile
functions.description: Sweep a sphere against the world and return the first blocking hit using a specific profile

functions.name: SphereTraceSingle
functions.description: Sweeps a sphere along the given line and returns the first blocking hit encountered.

functions.name: SphereTraceMultiForObjects
functions.description: Sweeps a sphere along the given line and returns all hits encountered.

functions.name: SphereTraceMultiByProfile
functions.description: Sweep a sphere against the world and return all initial overlaps using a specific profile, then overlapping hits and then first blocking hit

functions.name: SphereTraceMulti
functions.description: Sweeps a sphere along the given line and returns all hits encountered up to and including the first blocking hit.

functions.name: SphereOverlapComponents
functions.description: Returns an array of components that overlap the given sphere.

functions.name: SphereOverlapActors
functions.description: Returns an array of actors that overlap the given sphere.

functions.name: SnapshotObject
functions.description: Notify the current transaction (if any) that this object is about to be modified and should be snapshot for intermediate update.

functions.name: ShowPlatformSpecificLeaderboardScreen
functions.description: Displays the built-in leaderboard GUI (iOS and Android only; this function may be renamed or moved in a future release)

functions.name: ShowPlatformSpecificAchievementsScreen
functions.description: Displays the built-in achievements GUI (iOS and Android only; this function may be renamed or moved in a future release)

functions.name: ShowInterstitialAd
functions.description: Shows the loaded interstitial ad (loaded with LoadInterstitialAd)

functions.name: ShowAdBanner
functions.description: Will show an ad banner (iAd on iOS, or AdMob on Android) on the top or bottom of screen, on top of the GL view (doesn't resize the view)

functions.name: SetWindowTitle
functions.description: Sets the game window title

functions.name: SetVolumeButtonsHandledBySystem
functions.description: Allows or inhibits system default handling of volume up and volume down buttons (Android only)

functions.name: SetVector3fPropertyByName
functions.description: Set a VECTOR3F property by name

functions.name: SetTransformPropertyByName
functions.description: Set a TRANSFORM property by name

functions.name: SetTextPropertyByName
functions.description: Set a TEXT property by name

functions.name: SetFieldPathPropertyByName
functions.description: Set a SOFTOBJECT property by name

functions.description: Perform a latent action with a retriggerable delay (specified in seconds).  Calling again while it is counting down will reset the countdown to Duration.

functions.description: * Resets the gamepad assignment to player controller id (Android and iOS only)

functions.description: Resets the gamepad to player controller id assignments (Android and iOS only)

functions.name: RaiseScriptError

functions.description: Prints a string to the log, and optionally, to the screen

functions.name: LaunchURL
functions.description: Opens the specified URL in the platform's web browser of choice

functions.name: LaunchExternalUrl
functions.description: Opens an external URL in the platform's web browser of choice if it meets the allowlist of passed in domains

functions.name: K2_UnPauseTimerHandle
functions.description: Resumes a paused timer from its current elapsed time.

functions.name: K2_UnPauseTimerDelegate
functions.description: Resumes a paused timer from its current elapsed time.

functions.name: K2_UnPauseTimer
functions.description: Resumes a paused timer from its current elapsed time.

functions.name: K2_TimerExistsHandle
functions.description: Returns true is a timer for the given handle exists, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_TimerExistsDelegate
functions.description: Returns true is a timer for the given delegate exists, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_TimerExists
functions.description: Returns true is a timer for the given delegate exists, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_SetTimerForNextTickDelegate
functions.description: Set a timer to execute a delegate next tick.

functions.name: K2_SetTimerForNextTick
functions.description: Set a timer to execute a delegate on the next tick.

functions.name: K2_SetTimerDelegate
functions.description: Set a timer to execute delegate. Setting an existing timer will reset that timer with updated parameters.

functions.name: K2_SetTimer
functions.description: Set a timer to execute delegate. Setting an existing timer will reset that timer with updated parameters.

functions.name: K2_PauseTimerHandle
functions.description: Pauses a set timer at its current elapsed time.

functions.name: K2_PauseTimerDelegate
functions.description: Pauses a set timer at its current elapsed time.

functions.name: K2_PauseTimer
functions.description: Pauses a set timer at its current elapsed time.

functions.name: K2_IsValidTimerHandle
functions.description: Returns whether the timer handle is valid. This does not indicate that there is an active timer that this handle references, but rather that it once referenced a valid timer.

functions.name: K2_IsTimerPausedHandle
functions.description: Returns true if a timer exists and is paused for the given handle, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_IsTimerPausedDelegate
functions.description: Returns true if a timer exists and is paused for the given delegate, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_IsTimerPaused
functions.description: Returns true if a timer exists and is paused for the given delegate, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_IsTimerActiveHandle
functions.description: Returns true if a timer exists and is active for the given handle, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_IsTimerActiveDelegate
functions.description: Returns true if a timer exists and is active for the given delegate, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_IsTimerActive
functions.description: Returns true if a timer exists and is active for the given delegate, false otherwise.

functions.name: K2_InvalidateTimerHandle
functions.description: Invalidate the supplied TimerHandle and return it.

functions.name: K2_GetTimerRemainingTimeHandle
functions.description: Returns time until the timer will next execute its handle.

functions.name: K2_GetTimerRemainingTimeDelegate
functions.description: Returns time until the timer will next execute its delegate.

functions.name: K2_GetTimerRemainingTime
functions.description: Returns time until the timer will next execute its delegate.

functions.name: K2_GetTimerElapsedTimeHandle
functions.description: Returns elapsed time for the given handle (time since current countdown iteration began).

functions.name: K2_GetTimerElapsedTimeDelegate
functions.description: Returns elapsed time for the given delegate (time since current countdown iteration began).

functions.name: K2_GetTimerElapsedTime
functions.description: Returns elapsed time for the given delegate (time since current countdown iteration began).

functions.name: K2_ClearTimerHandle
functions.description: Clears a set timer.

functions.name: K2_ClearTimerDelegate
functions.description: Clears a set timer.

functions.name: K2_ClearTimer
functions.description: Clears a set timer.

functions.name: K2_ClearAndInvalidateTimerHandle
functions.description: Clears a set timer.

functions.name: IsValidSoftObjectReference

functions.description: Returns true if the Soft Class Reference is not null

functions.name: IsValidPrimaryAssetType
functions.description: Returns list of Primary Asset Ids for a PrimaryAssetType

functions.description: Returns true if the Primary Asset Id is valid

functions.name: IsValidInterface
functions.description: Checks if the interface instance has a valid object for blueprint interface functions.

functions.name: IsValidClass
functions.description: Return true if the class is usable : non-null and not pending kill

functions.name: IsValid
functions.description: Return true if the object is usable : non-null and not pending kill

functions.name: IsUnattended
functions.description: Returns true if running unattended (-unattended is on the command line)

functions.name: IsStandalone
functions.description: Returns whether this game instance is stand alone (no networking).

functions.name: IsSplitScreen
functions.description: IsSplitScreen

functions.name: IsServer
functions.description: Returns whether the world this object is in is the host or not

functions.name: IsScreensaverEnabled
functions.description: Returns true if screen saver is enabled.

functions.name: IsPackagedForDistribution
functions.description: Returns whether this is a build that is packaged for distribution

functions.name: IsObjectOfSoftClass
functions.description: Returns true if Object is of type SoftClass - either an instance of the class or child class, or implements the interface. Alternative to Cast - slower but without adding a hard reference.

functions.name: IsObjectCooked
functions.description: Returns true if the object is cooked

functions.name: IsLoggedIn
functions.description: Returns whether the player is logged in to the currently active online subsystem.

functions.name: IsInterstitialAdRequested
functions.description: Returns true if the requested interstitial ad has been successfully requested (false if load request fails)

functions.name: IsInterstitialAdAvailable
functions.description: Returns true if the requested interstitial ad is loaded and ready

functions.name: IsEditorPropertyOverridden
functions.description: Attempts to query whether the value of a named property on the given object overrides the value of its archetype (ie, would ResetEditorProperty do anything?).

functions.name: IsDedicatedServer
functions.description: Returns whether this is running on a dedicated server

functions.name: IsControllerAssignedToGamepad
functions.description: Returns true if controller id assigned to a gamepad (Android and iOS only)

functions.name: HideAdBanner
functions.description: Hides the ad banner (iAd on iOS, or AdMob on Android). Will force close the ad if it's open

functions.name: HasMultipleLocalPlayers
functions.description: Returns whether there are currently multiple local players in the given world

functions.name: GetVolumeButtonsHandledBySystem
functions.description: Returns true if system default handling of volume up and volume down buttons enabled (Android only)

functions.name: GetUniqueDeviceId

functions.description: Allows or inhibits screensaver

functions.name: ComponentOverlapComponents
functions.description: Returns an array of components that overlap the given component.

functions.name: ComponentOverlapActors
functions.description: Returns an array of actors that overlap the given component.

functions.name: CollectGarbage
functions.description: Deletes all unreferenced objects, keeping only referenced objects (this command will be queued and happen at the end of the frame)

functions.name: CapsuleTraceSingleForObjects
functions.description: Sweeps a capsule along the given line and returns the first hit encountered.

functions.name: CapsuleTraceSingleByProfile
functions.description: Sweep a capsule against the world and return the first blocking hit using a specific profile

functions.name: CapsuleTraceSingle
functions.description: Sweeps a capsule along the given line and returns the first blocking hit encountered.

functions.name: CapsuleTraceMultiForObjects
functions.description: Sweeps a capsule along the given line and returns all hits encountered.

functions.name: CapsuleTraceMultiByProfile
functions.description: Sweep a capsule against the world and return all initial overlaps using a specific profile, then overlapping hits and then first blocking hit

functions.name: CapsuleTraceMulti
functions.description: Sweeps a capsule along the given line and returns all hits encountered up to and including the first blocking hit.

functions.name: CapsuleOverlapComponentsWithOrientation
functions.description: Returns an array of components that overlap the given capsule.

functions.name: CapsuleOverlapComponents
functions.description: Returns an array of components that overlap the given capsule.

functions.name: CapsuleOverlapActorsWithOrientation
functions.description: Returns an array of actors that overlap the given capsule.

functions.name: CapsuleOverlapActors
functions.description: Returns an array of actors that overlap the given capsule.

functions.name: CanLaunchURL
functions.description: CanLaunchURL

functions.name: CancelTransaction
functions.description: Cancel the current transaction, and no longer capture actions to be placed in the undo buffer.

functions.name: BreakTopLevelAssetPath
functions.description: Gets the path string out of a TopLevelAssetPath

functions.name: BreakSoftObjectPath
functions.description: Gets the path string out of a Soft Object Path

functions.name: BreakSoftClassPath
functions.description: Gets the path string out of a Soft Class Path

functions.name: BreakARFilter
functions.description: Breaks an ARFilter struct into its component pieces. You should be using ClassPaths and RecursiveClassPathsExclusionSet from this node, ClassNames and RecursiveClassesExclusionSet are deprecated.

functions.name: BoxTraceSingleForObjects
functions.description: Sweeps a box along the given line and returns the first hit encountered.

functions.name: BoxTraceSingleByProfile
functions.description: Sweep a box against the world and return the first blocking hit using a specific profile

functions.name: BoxTraceSingle
functions.description: Sweeps a box along the given line and returns the first blocking hit encountered.

functions.name: BoxTraceMultiForObjects
functions.description: Sweeps a box along the given line and returns all hits encountered.

functions.name: BoxTraceMultiByProfile
functions.description: Sweep a box against the world and return all initial overlaps using a specific profile, then overlapping hits and then first blocking hit

functions.name: BoxTraceMulti
functions.description: Sweeps a box along the given line and returns all hits encountered.

functions.name: BoxOverlapComponentsWithOrientation
functions.description: Returns an array of components that overlap the given box.

functions.name: BoxOverlapComponents
functions.description: Returns an array of components that overlap the given axis-aligned box.

functions.name: BoxOverlapActorsWithOrientation
functions.description: Returns an array of actors that overlap the given axis-aligned box.

functions.name: BoxOverlapActors
functions.description: Returns an array of actors that overlap the given axis-aligned box.

functions.name: BeginTransaction
functions.description: Begin a new undo transaction. An undo transaction is defined as all actions which take place when the user selects "undo" a single time.

functions.name: AddFloatHistorySample
functions.description: AddFloatHistorySample
